payload.objective: Review the generated inbox runner together with its reviewed delegate script from the local inbox pipeline and provide a structured verdict using one of: pass, fail, needs_revision. Always output a review markdown artifact and include verdict in metadata.

params.title: Prepare PDF to Excel OCR pilot run (best-effort reviewable attempt)
params.description:
Use local sample directory to run PDF->Excel conversion and produce review evidence.

Execution contract: treat this as a best-effort, evidence-backed PDF extraction/conversion attempt. Do not claim OCR success without evidence. If full OCR/Excel conversion is not honestly achievable, return reviewable intermediate artifacts, explicit limitations, and next-step guidance. Keep behavior deterministic and limited to declared local artifacts.

review_scope.goal: Audit the wrapper and the reviewed delegate together so the review evidence can speak to the end-to-end readonly smoke path.

artifact_snapshots.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Reviewable inbox runner for best-effort PDF->Excel OCR pilot execution.

This wrapper prefers reusing the reviewed repository delegate
``artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py`` and emits a structured JSON summary.
It is intentionally conservative about claiming success.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import os
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional


DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 1800


@dataclass
class RunnerConfig:
    input_dir: str
    output_xlsx: str
    ocr: str = "auto"
    dry_run: bool = False
    origin_id: str = ""
    title: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    preferred_base_script: str = "artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py"
    timeout_seconds: int = DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS


def _repo_root() -> Path:
    return Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]


def _resolve_repo_path(path_value: str) -> Path:
    candidate = Path(path_value).expanduser()
    if candidate.is_absolute():
        return candidate
    script_dir = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    script_relative = (script_dir / candidate).resolve()
    if script_relative.exists():
        return script_relative
    return (_repo_root() / candidate).resolve()


def _discover_pdfs(input_dir: str) -> List[str]:
    root = Path(input_dir).expanduser()
    if not root.exists() or not root.is_dir():
        return []
    return sorted(str(p) for p in root.rglob("*.pdf") if p.is_file()) + sorted(
        str(p) for p in root.rglob("*.PDF") if p.is_file()
    )


def _load_json_file(path: Path) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    try:
        if not path.exists():
            return None
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        return None


def _load_json_from_stdout(stdout_text: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
    text = (stdout_text or "").strip()
    if not text:
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(text)
    except Exception:
        return None


def _safe_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:
    try:
        return int(value)
    except Exception:
        return default


def _status_counter(report: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, int]:
    counter = report.get("status_counter")
    if not isinstance(counter, dict):
        return {"success": 0, "partial": 0, "failed": 0}
    return {
        "success": _safe_int(counter.get("success", 0)),
        "partial": _safe_int(counter.get("partial", 0)),
        "failed": _safe_int(counter.get("failed", 0)),
    }


def _build_delegate_command(config: RunnerConfig, delegate_script: Path, report_path: Path) -> List[str]:
    cmd = [
        sys.executable,
        str(delegate_script),
        "--input-dir",
        config.input_dir,
        "--output-xlsx",
        config.output_xlsx,
        "--ocr",
        config.ocr,
        "--report-json",
        str(report_path),
    ]
    if config.origin_id:
        cmd.extend(["--origin-id", config.origin_id])
    if config.title:
        cmd.extend(["--title", config.title])
    if config.description:
        cmd.extend(["--description", config.description])
    if config.dry_run:
        cmd.append("--dry-run")
    return cmd


def _result(
    *,
    status: str,
    summary: str,
    config: RunnerConfig,
    discovered_pdfs: List[str],
    delegate_script: Optional[Path] = None,
    delegate_command: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    delegate_exit_code: Optional[int] = None,
    delegate_report: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    limitations: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    next_steps: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    error: Optional[str] = None,
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    output_path = Path(config.output_xlsx).expanduser()
    output_exists = output_path.exists()
    output_size = output_path.stat().st_size if output_exists else 0
    payload: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "status": status,
        "summary": summary,
        "origin_id": config.origin_id,
        "title": config.title,
        "description": config.description,
        "input_dir": config.input_dir,
        "output_xlsx": config.output_xlsx,
        "ocr": config.ocr,
        "dry_run": config.dry_run,
        "pdf_count": len(discovered_pdfs),
        "discovered_pdfs": discovered_pdfs,
        "delegate_script": str(delegate_script) if delegate_script else None,
        "delegate_command": delegate_command,
        "delegate_exit_code": delegate_exit_code,
        "delegate_report": delegate_report,
        "output_exists": output_exists,
        "output_size_bytes": output_size,
        "limitations": limitations or [],
        "next_steps": next_steps or [],
        "error": error,
    }
    return payload


def run(config: RunnerConfig) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    discovered_pdfs = _discover_pdfs(config.input_dir)
    delegate_script = _resolve_repo_path(config.preferred_base_script)

    if not delegate_script.exists():
        return _result(
            status="failed",
            summary="Reviewed PDF-to-Excel delegate script was not found; cannot run reviewable readonly conversion honestly.",
            config=config,
            discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
            delegate_script=delegate_script,
            limitations=[
                "The requested reviewed delegate script is missing.",
                "Readonly reviewable flow must not broaden behavior to an arbitrary helper.",
            ],
            next_steps=[
                "Restore artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py in the repository.",
                "Re-run this inbox runner after the reviewed delegate is available.",
            ],
            error="delegate_not_found",
        )

    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="pdf_to_excel_ocr_runner_") as tmpdir:
        report_path = Path(tmpdir) / "delegate_report.json"
        cmd = _build_delegate_command(config, delegate_script, report_path)

        try:
            completed = subprocess.run(
                cmd,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=config.timeout_seconds,
                cwd=str(_repo_root()),
            )
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired as exc:
            return _result(
                status="failed",
                summary="Delegate execution timed out before producing a reviewable completion result.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                limitations=[
                    f"Delegate exceeded timeout of {config.timeout_seconds} seconds.",
                    "No honest success claim can be made for an incomplete OCR/conversion run.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Investigate large or problematic PDFs in the input directory.",
                    "Increase timeout only if longer reviewed runs are acceptable.",
                ],
                error=f"delegate_timeout: {exc}",
            )

        delegate_report = _load_json_file(report_path)
        if delegate_report is None:
            delegate_report = _load_json_from_stdout(completed.stdout)

        if not isinstance(delegate_report, dict):
            return _result(
                status="failed",
                summary="Delegate did not provide a usable structured JSON report, so wrapper cannot attest a reviewable outcome.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                limitations=[
                    "Canonical sidecar report was unavailable or unreadable.",
                    "Stdout fallback did not contain valid JSON evidence.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Inspect the reviewed delegate CLI and ensure --report-json is supported and functioning.",
                    "Review delegate stderr/stdout in a local run if needed.",
                ],
                error="delegate_report_missing_or_invalid",
            )

        delegate_status = str(delegate_report.get("status", "")).strip().lower()
        total_files = _safe_int(delegate_report.get("total_files", 0))
        status_counter = _status_counter(delegate_report)
        delegate_dry_run = bool(delegate_report.get("dry_run", False))
        excel_written = bool(delegate_report.get("excel_written", False))
        output_exists = bool(delegate_report.get("output_exists", False))
        output_size_bytes = _safe_int(delegate_report.get("output_size_bytes", 0))

        if delegate_status == "success":
            success_gates_ok = all(
                [
                    total_files >= 1,
                    delegate_dry_run is False,
                    status_counter.get("failed", 0) == 0,
                    status_counter.get("partial", 0) == 0,
                    excel_written is True,
                    output_exists is True,
                    output_size_bytes > 0,
                ]
            )
            if success_gates_ok:
                return _result(
                    status="success",
                    summary="Reviewed delegate reported a successful PDF-to-Excel run with strong output evidence.",
                    config=config,
                    discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                    delegate_script=delegate_script,
                    delegate_command=cmd,
                    delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                    delegate_report=delegate_report,
                )
            return _result(
                status="partial",
                summary="Delegate reported success, but wrapper evidence gates for a trustworthy reviewable success claim were not fully satisfied.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                delegate_report=delegate_report,
                limitations=[
                    "Success-only evidence gates were not fully met.",
                    "Wrapper will not equate exit code plus file presence with proven success.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Inspect delegate report fields for excel_written, output_exists, output_size_bytes, and status_counter values.",
                    "Re-run after addressing any partial or attestation gaps reported by the delegate.",
                ],
                error="delegate_success_evidence_insufficient",
            )

        if delegate_status == "partial":
            return _result(
                status="partial",
                summary="Best-effort delegate completed with a partial reviewable outcome; limitations and next steps are preserved honestly.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                delegate_report=delegate_report,
                limitations=[
                    "Delegate reported partial rather than full success.",
                    "Best-effort readonly flow preserves partial status instead of overstating completion.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Review delegate report details to identify incomplete extraction or OCR gaps.",
                    "Provide cleaner PDFs, adjust OCR conditions, or re-run after remediating reported limitations.",
                ],
            )

        if config.dry_run:
            return _result(
                status="partial",
                summary="Dry-run was delegated explicitly and completed without claiming a produced XLSX artifact.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                delegate_report=delegate_report,
                limitations=[
                    "Dry-run mode is reviewable planning evidence, not production output evidence.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Re-run without --dry-run to attempt XLSX generation.",
                ],
            )

        if len(discovered_pdfs) == 0 or total_files == 0:
            return _result(
                status="partial",
                summary="No PDFs were discovered for processing, so no XLSX artifact can be claimed.",
                config=config,
                discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
                delegate_script=delegate_script,
                delegate_command=cmd,
                delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
                delegate_report=delegate_report,
                limitations=[
                    "Zero input PDFs were available under the provided input directory.",
                ],
                next_steps=[
                    "Place one or more PDF files under the provided input directory and re-run.",
                ],
            )

        return _result(
            status="failed",
            summary="Reviewed delegate did not report a successful reviewable outcome.",
            config=config,
            discovered_pdfs=discovered_pdfs,
            delegate_script=delegate_script,
            delegate_command=cmd,
            delegate_exit_code=completed.returncode,
            delegate_report=delegate_report,
            limitations=[
                f"Delegate status was {delegate_status or 'unknown'}.",
                "Wrapper cannot broaden claims beyond reviewed delegate evidence.",
            ],
            next_steps=[
                "Inspect the delegate JSON report for failure details.",
                "Correct the reported issues and re-run the pilot.",
            ],
            error="delegate_reported_non_success",
        )


def parse_args(argv: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> RunnerConfig:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run reviewable PDF->Excel OCR inbox wrapper")
    parser.add_argument("--input-dir", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--output-xlsx", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--ocr", default="auto")
    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--origin-id", default="")
    parser.add_argument("--title", default="")
    parser.add_argument("--description", default="")
    parser.add_argument("--preferred-base-script", default="artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py")
    parser.add_argument("--timeout-seconds", type=int, default=DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    return RunnerConfig(
        input_dir=args.input_dir,
        output_xlsx=args.output_xlsx,
        ocr=args.ocr,
        dry_run=args.dry_run,
        origin_id=args.origin_id,
        title=args.title,
        description=args.description,
        preferred_base_script=args.preferred_base_script,
        timeout_seconds=args.timeout_seconds,
    )


def main(argv: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> int:
    config = parse_args(argv)
    result = run(config)
    json.dump(result, sys.stdout, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    sys.stdout.write("\n")
    status = result.get("status")
    if status == "success":
        return 0
    if status == "partial":
        return 2
    return 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

review_contract.artifact_policy: Always include either `file_contents` for the review artifact path or `artifacts` referencing that exact path.
review_contract.fallback_policy: If evidence is insufficient, return `status=partial`, include explicit `errors`, still generate review artifact content, and set verdict=needs_revision.

constraints: Review must be grounded in produced automation artifact
When both wrapper and reviewed delegate snapshots are supplied, evaluate them as one end-to-end readonly pair instead of ignoring the delegate evidence.
Do not invent missing artifact content
Return a clear verdict: pass, fail, or needs_revision
Generate review artifact markdown for expected_outputs[0].path
Use artifact_snapshots when provided; avoid claiming access problems if snapshot content exists.
When both the generated wrapper and reviewed delegate snapshots are provided, review them together rather than silently narrowing scope to one file.
Return metadata.verdict with one of: pass, fail, needs_revision.
Always generate review artifact content for expected_outputs[0].path.
If evidence is insufficient, use partial + errors + verdict=needs_revision, but still output review artifact.

source.title: Prepare PDF to Excel OCR pilot run (best-effort reviewable attempt)

acceptance_criteria: Produce a review artifact with explicit verdict (pass/fail/needs_revision)

result.summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly pair. Verdict: needs_revision due to interface mismatch causing the runner to pass unsupported CLI arguments to the delegate, which breaks the advertised wrapper-to-delegate smoke path despite otherwise conservative evidence handling.
notes: Review was grounded in the provided artifact snapshots for both scripts.
Assessment covered wrapper/delegate integration, not just isolated file quality.
Primary issue is a contract mismatch: the runner forwards --origin-id, --title, and --description, but the delegate does not define those CLI options.
